name: instagram-caption
description: Write an engaging Instagram caption with a strong hook, storytelling body, CTA, and a curated set of hashtags to maximize reach.
input_description: Post topic or image description, brand voice (fun, inspirational, educational, luxury, etc.), target audience, and desired action (follow, comment, click link in bio).
output_description: Instagram caption with an attention-grabbing first line, 3-6 sentence body, line breaks for readability, a clear CTA, and 15-25 relevant hashtags grouped by reach tier.
